authoritative_requirement: Compile the Atomic Content Harness profile while preserving its complete declared contract and authorization boundary.
generic_mode_satisfaction: Compile one synthetic AtomicHarnessDefinition with explicit source/IR/boundary/context/capability/module/phase/handoff/skill/acceptance/output/authority references; non-applicable category and production fields remain explicit.
test_seam: definition completeness; semantic preservation; synthetic marker; no-runtime tests

authoritative_requirement: Each compilation target declares its own required repositories, contracts, examples, prior implementations, doctrine, and target folder expectations.
generic_mode_satisfaction: Bind the definition only to the repository-owned synthetic source profile and its immutable Source Lock; no Format 02 or external source is consulted.
test_seam: exact source profile and lock; altered or foreign source rejection

authoritative_requirement: Canonical Harness IR provides a shared governance spine plus typed target-local sections and validation rules.
generic_mode_satisfaction: Bind exact active Harness IR canonical bytes/hash and one typed generic atomic-content-harness projection without an uncontrolled optional-field sea.
test_seam: IR hash and lineage; canonical target projection; changed input identity

authoritative_requirement: Each target defines constitutional decisions, dependencies, evidence, ratification owners, and cascade-lock conditions appropriate to its authority.
generic_mode_satisfaction: Bind the pre-ratified synthetic decision lineage, constitutional precedence, responsibility modules, Phase Graph, handoff, context, and skill-necessity evidence; do not reopen Genesis.
test_seam: authority and ratification; cascade invalidation; borrowed decision rejection
